summary: Completed Issue #128 for the Phase 3/4 MVP by connecting the accepted dataset mixing and versioning rules to a machine-readable Phase 4 freeze gate. The gate audits the Phase 3 manifest, all clip metadata, loader structure, grouped split integrity, version/model/render provenance, class scope, clip policy, and QC. It also resolves the Phase 2 source manifest and all selected run configs, records their SHA-256 digests, and verifies RUN-fixed, Brownian-disabled, baseline-torque, and n_flagella evidence. Baseline training and grouped learning curves reuse the same strict validator. The full 27-group dataset v1 candidate set passed the audit and both downstream workflows.
non_blocking_issues: RUN-TUMBLE profile values, n_flagella=4 reconsideration, and broad render-domain ranges remain deferred to dataset v2 in Issue #145.
The final independent-run-count adoption decision remains in Issue #129.

tests_reviewed.command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_phase4_dataset_freeze.py tests/test_phase4_learning_curve.py tests/test_phase4_baseline_classifier.py tests/test_phase4_clip_dataset_loader.py

tests_reviewed.result: PASS (54 clips, 27 groups, 27 source configs, 0 errors, 0 warnings)

adr_reason: This gate implements already accepted Issue #128 MVP rules without changing the dataset schema, physical model, dataset adoption, dependencies, or phase boundaries. Remaining v2 policy changes are explicitly deferred.
next_actions: Review and merge the Issue #128 freeze gate.
Decide Issue #129: adopt four training groups per class as the pseudo-v1 MVP lower bound or require additional protected evaluation groups.
Keep RUN-TUMBLE dataset v2 deferred in Issue #145 with Project Status TODO.
